products.description: Ontdek uw "Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War PVC statuette FiguartsZERO B" figuren op 1001hobbies, de specialist van Bandai✔️

products.name: 67345 Dragon Ball Daima SH Figuarts Vegeta
products.description: Geweldig Vegeta figuur in de Dragon Ball SH Figuarts series van Bandai

products.name: 66639 Dragon Ball Daima SH Figuarts Vegeta mini
products.description: Geweldig mini Vegeta figuur in de Dragon Ball SH Figuarts series van Bandai, gebaseerd op de 2024 film Dragon Ball Damai.

products.name: One Piece S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Monkey D. Luffy Romance Dawn 15 cm
products.description:
MONKEY.D.LUFFY -ROMANCE DAWN-, from the animated television series "ONE PIECE," joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring a totally new sculpt and enhanced posability that lets you capture the most dynamic scenes!

Set Contents:

- Main Body
- Three pairs of optional hands
- Three optional expressions
- Optional hair
- Meat accessory

products.name: NieR: Automata S.H. Figuarts Action Figure 2B 15 cm
products.description:
The story of androids who battle for humanity continues in the new anime series "Nier: Automata Ver1.1a," and the protagonist 2B is joining S.H.Figuarts! Accessories include a face variation without goggles and a Pod 042.

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expression parts, Three left and two right optional hands, Pod 042, White Contract, Stand

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Kaidou King of the Beasts (Man-Beast Form)
One Piece S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Yamato 18 cm
products.description:
From the anime series "ONE PIECE," YAMATO joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring high posability that lets you re-create your favorite scenes. Flexible parts are used for the clothing so as not to interfere with even the most dynamic of poses!

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expression parts, Four left, six right, optional hands; and one of both hands together, Club, Optional face part for S.H.Figuarts MONKEY.D.LUFFY -The Raid on Onigashima-(sold separately), Stand

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Obito Uchiha (Hollow Dreams of Despair)
Deadpool 2 S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Deadpool 16 cm
products.description:
Deadpool, as seen in "Deadpool 2," arrives with gun effect parts, a holster, and tons of accessories for you to re-create your favorite scenes!

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional eyes, Eight pairs of optional hands,Two swords, Scabbard, Gun (normal) x2, Gun (with firing effect) x2, Gun (with smoke effect) x2, Holster (x2), Knife, Knife case, Bomb collar

products.name: Chainsaw Man S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Samurai Sword 17 cm
products.description:
Samurai Sword, from the hit manga and anime series, "Chainsaw Man" joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring full posability and a coat molded from flexible material to allow for natural and dramatic poses. Option parts let you re-create your favorite scenes from the series.

Set Contents: Main Body, Optional jaw, Two pairs of optional hands

products.name: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Spider-Man 15 cm
products.description:
"I love you guys!" Peter 3, from "The Amazing Spider-Man joins S.H.Figuarts! Faithfully replicates his Spider-suit's fine detail, with translucent parts used for the eyes to bring the figure to life for dynamic action scenes. Re-create the drama of The Amazing Spider-Man2 on your desktop or display shelf!

Set Contents: Main Body, Five pairs of optional hands, Web (Large), Web (Long) x2, Web (Small) x2

products.name: Chainsaw Man S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Power 15 cm
products.description: Here comes an action figure of Power from "CHAINSAW MAN", perfectly capturing her on-screen appearance. Full poseability is enhanced by the use of flexible material for her jacket and shirt, letting you pose the figure without hindrance. Numerous options let you re-create your favorite scenes!

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Venom (Venom: Let There Be Carnage)
Tech-On Avengers S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Venom Symbiote Wolverine 16 cm
products.description:
The newest villain in the TECH-ON AVENGERS series, Venom Symbiote Wolverine, joins S.H.Figuarts with diecast metal parts! Finished in metallic colors to accentuate the fusion of Wolverine with Venom, it features tube parts molded in translucent plastic, repulsor effects that can be used with other figures, and a stand that helps support dynamic poses, letting you re-create your favorite battle scenes!

Set Contents: Main body, Two pairs of optional hands, Wire claw whip, Long repulsor effect parts, Stand

products.name: Elden Ring S.H.Figuarts Action Figure Festering Fingerprint Vyke 16 cm
products.description:
The first release in the new S.H.Figuarts ELDEN RING series! Festering Fingerprint Vyke is fully articulated, with flexible materials used for dynamic and unhindered posing. The set also includes both Vyke's War Spear and The Flame of frenzy effect parts (pictures to be added pending licensor approval), letting you re-create dramatic scenes.

Set Contents:

Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Vyke's War Spear, The Flame of frenzy effect part

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Naruto Uzumaki (The No.1 Most Unpredictable Ninja)
S.H.Figuarts Pan Super Hero
Spy x Family S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Anya Forger Uniform Ver. 8 cm
products.description: From the smash hit anime series "SPY x FAMILY," Anya Forger joins S.H.Figuarts in a school uniform version! Optional hands and expressions let you capture Anya's unique poses.

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Suletta Mercury
S.H.Figuarts Majin Buu (Good) (Exclusive Edition)
One Piece S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Sanji (The Raid on Onigashima) 15 cm
products.description:
Sanji, as seen in The Raid on Onigashima arc of the ONE PIECE animated series, rejoins S.H.Figuarts with an all new sculpt! Superb articulation and flexible parts make for dynamic posability. Also includes an optional expression for the Monkey D. Luffy - The Raid on
Onigashima - S.H.Figuarts toy (sold separately).

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expression parts, Three right and one left optional hands,
Diable Jambe (Black Leg Style) effect parts L/R, Optional thigh parts, Optional expression for Monkey D. Luffy - The Raid on Onigashima - S.H.Figuarts toy (sold separately)

products.name: One Piece S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Roronoa Zoro (The Raid on Onigashima) 15 cm
products.description:
Roronoa Zoro, as seen in The Raid on Onigashima arc of the ONE PIECE animated series, rejoins S.H.Figuarts with an all new sculpt! Superb articulation and flexible parts make for dynamic posability. Also includes an optional expression for the Monkey D. Luffy - The Raid on Onigashima - S.H.Figuarts toy (sold separately).

Set Contents: Main Body, Three optional expression parts (normal head), Optional head (with tenugui bandana), Two pairs of optional hands, Optional upper arm parts, Sword set (for waist), Three swords (drawn), Optional expression for Monkey D. Luffy - The Raid on Onigashima - S.H.Figuarts toy (sold separately)

products.name: The Batman S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Batman 15 cm
products.description:
From the new film "The Batman" Batman (Bruce Wayne) joins the S.H.Figuarts lineup. Standing approximately 6 inches tall, this 1/12 scale figure includes a cloth cape with integrated posing wire, and an unmasked face portrait of Bruce Wayne featuring the black paint around his eyes as seen in the film. Both faces use Tamashii Nations' Digital Printing technology to capture the actor's likeness in fine detail. Other included accessories are the Bat Knife that forms from his chest emblem, handcuffs, grapnel launchers, and the adrenaline pen.

Set Contents:

Batman figure, Unmasked Bruce Wayne face portrait, Interchangeable chest plate, Interchangeable hands (left/right, 5 types), Grapnel launchers left/right, Bat Knife, Handcuffs, Adrenaline Pen.

products.name: Marvel S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Deadpool 16 cm
products.description:
DEADPOOL joins S.H.Figuarts! Sculpted in all of the detail you've come to expect from S.H.Figuarts, it includes numerous eye and hand parts that let you re-create your favorite moments from the film.

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional eyes, Eight pairs of optional hands, Two swords, Sword (stowed), Knife, Knife scabbard (empty), Eye replacement tool

products.name: Lightyear S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Buzz Lightyear Alpha Suit 15 cm
products.description:
To infinity and beyond! Buzz Lightyear, as seen in his "Alpha Suit" from the Pixar movie "Lightyear," joins S.H.Figuarts! Numerous options and accessories let you re-create your favorite scenes from the film.

Set Contents:

Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Optional head, Jetpack, Jetpack open mode parts, Rascal Blaster, Laser Blade DX, Laser Gauntlet Strap, Tamashii STAGE Connector

products.name: Digimon Adventure S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Angewomon 15 cm
products.description:
Angewomon, partner Digimon of Kari Kamiya (Hikari Yagami), joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring a completely new sculpt that captures the on-screen appearance and proportions perfectly! The eight wings on its back are articulated for dynamic posability. Two expression options plus Holy Arrow parts let you re-create favorite scenes -- even the moment of launching a Holy Arrow attack!

Set Contents: Main Body, Two pairs of optional hands, Two optional expression parts, Holy Arrow set, Stand

products.name: Tech-On Avengers S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Captain America 16 cm
products.description:
Captain America from "Tech-On Avengers" joins S.H.Figuarts! Entirely re-envisioned by artist Eiichi Shimizu, this Captain America features a metallic finish and a frame incorporating diecast metal parts. Packed with effects and accessories, it also lets you replicate the Tech-On Avengers' trademark DH-10 Mode.

Set Contents: Main Body, Four pairs of optional hands, DH-10 Armor, Shield (normal), Shield (DH-10), Shield effect parts, Chest effect parts, Optional sleeves, Shield joint set, Shield throwing effect , Fist effect parts, Repulsor effects (feet) (x2), Repulsor effects (hands) (x2), Stand

products.name: Spider-Man: No Way Home S.H. Figuarts Action Figure The Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man 15 cm
products.description:
Peter 2, making a surprise comeback after 20 years in "Spider-Man: No Way Home," joins S.H.Figuarts! The Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man edition features a faithfully accurate facial sculpt. Now you can replicate scenes of him offering advice to his younger counterpart (sold separately), re-creating one of the performances of the century, right on your desktop!

Set Contents:

Main Body, Five pairs of optional hands, Two optional head, Removed mask, Web (large), Web (long) (x2), Web (short) (x2)

products.name: Digimon Tamers S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Dukemon/Gallantmon - Rebirth Of Holy Knight 18 cm
products.description:
Dukemon, one of the Royal Knights, rejoins S.H.Figuarts as a completed action figure!
It features a totally new sculpt and design from the D-Arts Dukemon (sold separately) for even more accurate proportions and posability. The
cloth cape features internal wires for dynamic posability.
A new Dukemon for a new generation of fans!

Set Contents: Main body, Optional pair of hands, Cloth cape, Holy Lance Gram, Holy Shield Aegis, Head parts, Stand connector, Stand set

products.name: Tech-On Avengers S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Iron Man 16 cm
products.description:
TECH-ON AVENGERS is a new S.H.Figuarts collaboration between Marvel Comics and Bandai Spirits! The first release in the series is Iron Man! It's a whole new look for Iron Man, designed by Eiichi Shimizu. The body is finished in metallic colors and the frame is diecast metal for a high-quality feel. Abundant options are the hallmark of the TECH-ON AVENGERS series, and Iron man does not disappoint! You can even
replicate Iron Man's DH-10 mode.

Set Contents: Main Body, Hand Repulsor Effects (x2), Optional Face, Foot Repulsor Effects (x2), Optional Shoulders (x2), Backpack Booster Unit, Forearm Cannons (x2), DH-10 Mode Set, Optional Calf Covers (x2), Two pairs of Optional Hands , Forearm Cannon Effects (x2)

products.name: Digital Monster X-evolution S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Alphamon:Ouryuken Premium Color Ed. 17 c
products.description:
ALPHAMON:OURYUKEN-Premium Color Edition- rejoins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring new premium coloring that captures Alphamon's beauty with metallic black and yellow gold details adopted by Kenji Watanabe. And it even includes new accessories: the Divine Sword Grade Alpha and thruster!

Set Contents: Main body, two pairs of optional left hands, three pairs of optional right hands, Cape (wire in), Sword hilt, Sword blade, Divine Sword Grade Alpha, Thruster with wing effect (L/R), Optional Thruster parts (L/R), Stand

products.name: Digimon Adventure: Our War Game! S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Omegamon Premium Color Edition 16 cm
products.description:
In commemoration of the classic "Digimon Adventure:" series comes this new edition of the S.H.Figuarts OMEGAMON in luxurious premium colors! Gorgeous pearlescent and metallic colors combine with a new PVC cape for an all new appearance. Celebrating 20 years of Digimon, this is a premium figure for discriminating collectors!

Set Contents: Main Body, Cape, Grey Sword, Garuru Cannon, Stand, Cape support rod

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Jiece
S.H.Figuarts Son Gohan (Kid Era)
S.H.Figuarts Piccolo (The Proud Namekian)
Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Great Ape Vegeta Tamashii Web Exclusive 35 cm
products.description:
Finally, GREAT APE VEGETA from Dragon Ball joins S.H.Figuarts brand with super big size of 35 cm!! This highly posable giant figure recreates several memorial scenes from Dragon Ball animation!

This set includes an optional left hand, two optional right hands, an optional grabbing hand parts for miniature Goku, an optional eyes part, two tail parts (Normal/Cut), miniature Yajirobe figure and a special display stand.

It stands approx. 35 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Son Goku Kaioken 14 cm
products.description:
A figure of Son Goku in his epic "Kaioh-ken" form! Finished with beautiful pearlescent parts to accentuate this dynamic move's power, you can recreate battles with Captain Ginyu, Vegeta, and Frieza (Sold separately)! The figure includes an optional head, two optional expression parts, and two pairs of optional hands.

It stands approx. 14 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: Dragon Ball S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Jackie Chun 14 cm
products.description:
Jackie Chun, who is the master of Marcial Arts, now joins S.H.Figuarts with full action! As well as funny face for him, various optional parts recreate the scenes from comics / TV series! This figure includes two optional face parts, seven optional right hands, six optional left hands, optional arm parts (R/L), a microphone part and dragon ball object (three-star ball at summoning Shenron).

It stands approx. 14 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: Dragon Ball S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Tao Pai Pai Tamashii Web Exclusive 15 cm
products.description:
Tao Pai Pai from Dragon Ball joins S.H.Figuarts series! Along with main body, additional face part for Dodon-pa and for the special killing move with his tangue are included. Also this set has pillar for flying and special stage for the flying pose. This set includes 2 optional face parts, 3 optional right hands, 2 optional left hands, a pillar, a set of special stand, a Dragon Ball (seven star), optional cloth parts and 2 optional soles for right/left foot.

It stands approx. 15 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: Dragon Ball S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Krillin (The Early Years) 10 cm
products.description:
The hugely popular Krillin joins the S.H.Figurarts series of highly posable and accurately sculpted action figures! This is the ultimate portrayal of Goku's onetime rival turned best friend forever. The set includes four left and five right optional hands, two optional expression parts, a Kamehameha effect, a "turtle" stone, a stand, and a six-star Dragon Ball (Ryushinchu).

It stands approx. 10 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: Batman Ninja S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Joker Demon King of the Sixth Heaven 16 cm
products.description: An incredible rendition of Batman's eternal enemy, the Joker, as seen in the hit Japanese anime Ninja Batman! Includes two fans, a katana sword with scabbard, optional head, and four optional pairs of hands.

products.name: S.H.Figuarts Ninja Batman
S.H.Figuarts Tamashii Girl Aoi
S.H.Figuarts Zero Two

products.name: Tsume HQS Dragon Ball Z 1/6 Krillin vs the Saibaimen
products.description:
Brand: Tsume

License: Dragon Ball Z

Type: HQS

Scale: 1/6

Size: H: 47 cm, W: 48 cm, D 45 cm

Materials: polyresin, PU, PVC, ABS, magnets

products.name: HQS – DBZ – Piccolo’s Redemption
products.description:
Estátua do personagem Piccolo e Gohan, como aparece na série Dragon Ball Z, retratando a parte epica onde o Piccolo sacrifica a vida para salvar o Son Gohan, na linha HQS da Tsume. Esta estátua mede cerca de 39 cm de altura e é feita em Polyresin.

Edição limitada de 2500 peças.

products.name: HQS – DBZ – The Quiet Wrath of Son Goku
products.description:
Estátua do Son Goku e Nappa, como aparecem na série Dragon Ball Z, retratando a parte epica onde o Son Goku se vinga do Nappa, depois de usar o Kaio-ken a primeira vez, na linha HQS da Tsume. Esta estátua mede cerca de 43 cm de altura e é feita em Polyresin.

Edição limitada de 4000 peças.

Bandai Dragon Ball GT S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Trunks
products.description:
Set contents:
- Main body
- Exchangeable hand parts left/right x 3 types
- Exchangeable expression parts x 3 types
- Exchangeable folded arms parts
- Exchangeable thigh parts
- [Bonus Part] Tail parts set for use with Son Goku GT

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Son Goku
products.description:

products.name: bandai Dragonball Super S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Freeza -Resurrection-
products.description:
bandai Dragonball Super S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Freeza -Resurrection-


"I am the mighty Frieza, and all of the horrible stories you've heard are true!"
From the anime Dragon Ball Super comes the wild and wildly powerful Frieza! His ancient yet ageless evil charm is captured in this action figure, letting fans replicate famed scenes from the series! The figure includes four pairs of optional hands, one set of optional arms, one set of optional legs, angel's halo, two optional expressions, tail, two effect parts and one effect part stand, plus a custom base (with a plate, support arm, and clip).

products.name: Bandai Dragonball Xenoverse S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Trunks
products.description:
Action figures Dragon Ball
The first Dragonball Xenoverse characters join the S.H.Figuarts series: Trunks and Time Patroller! These characters from the super smash hit videogame come with optional heads to replicate Super Saiyajin mode, just like in the game. The 14 cm Trunks figure comes with 3 types of optional hands (L/R), 3 optional expressions, an optional head, the Book of Ending and Beginning, and two types of sword (one stowed, one ready for action.)

From the Dragon Ball Super series
Featuring Whis as an articulated figure

products.name: Bandai Vegetto SH Figuarts Event Exclusive Color Edition
products.description:
PRODUCT OVERVIEW


Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan Vegito is released in all-new modeling !
Comes with a variety of face parts such as his iconic compound smile, the teeth-gritting face for action scenes, and the shouting face for the Kamehameha pose. Also comes with effect parts for his special attack Final Kamehameha !
The special attack Spirit Sword that he used against Fused Zamasu is detachable and can recreate the scene where it penetrates Zamasu’s body !

products.name: Bandai Dragonball S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Master Roshi Tamashii Web Exclusive
products.description:
Bandai Dragonball S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Master Roshi Tamashii Web Exclusive
Goku's master in his younger years, and a regular presence in Dragon Ball Super today, joins S.H.Figurarts! Long requested by fans, Master Roshi is finally here after attracting huge amounts of attention at Tamashii Nations events.
Includes removable shell, four pairs of optional hands, three optional heads (battle, laughing, and without glasses), three optional mouths (closed, open, grinning), a cane, a Dragon Ball (three stars), and a stand.
